files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,76 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "kubearmor-889-go-vulnerability-scan",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "kubearmor: go vulnerability scan",
+    "description": "go vulnerability scan. Community-requested feature.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current kubearmor deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your kubearmor version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n kubearmor -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kubearmor\nhelm list -n kubearmor 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working kubearmor installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review kubearmor configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant kubearmor configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n kubearmor -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kubearmor\nkubectl get configmap -n kubearmor -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=kubearmor\n```\n[Golang has announced](https://go.dev/blog/vuln) new support for vulnerability management that will help developers learn about the known vulnerabilities that may affect them."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for go vulnerability scan",
+        "description": "I have looked into the issue and I think for the issue we need to check all the directories where we are using any external dependencies. \n\n```bash\nfind . -name 'go.mod' -printf \"%h\\n\" | sort -u \n```yaml\nfind . -name 'go.mod' -printf \"%h\\n\" | sort -u  \n./deployments\n./KubeArmor\n./KubeArmor/BPF/tests\n./pkg/KubeArmorAnnotation\n./pkg/KubeArmorController\n./pkg/KubeArmorHostPolicy\n./pkg/KubeArmorPolicy\n./protobuf\n./tests\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n kubearmor -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kubearmor\nkubectl get events -n kubearmor --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"go vulnerability scan\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "I have looked into the issue and I think for the issue we need to check all the directories where we are using any external dependencies. \n\n```bash\nfind .",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "find . -name 'go.mod' -printf \"%h\\n\" | sort -u  \n./deployments\n./KubeArmor\n./KubeArmor/BPF/tests\n./pkg/KubeArmorAnnotation\n./pkg/KubeArmorController\n./pkg/KubeArmorHostPolicy\n./pkg/KubeArmorPolicy\n./protobuf\n./tests"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "kubearmor",
+      "sandbox",
+      "app-definition",
+      "feature"
+    ],

+      "kubearmor"
+    ],

+      "Deployment"
+    ],

+    ],

+      "issue": "https://github.com/kubearmor/KubeArmor/issues/889",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/kubearmor/kubearmor"
+    },
+    "reactions": 2,

+  },

+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl"
+    ],

+  },
